_comment: Per-part materials for _reference/assets/switch.step (a single MX-style switch), so the frame-3 hover pile shows a real housing / coloured stem / copper pins instead of grey clay. Solids bucket cleanly by volume: housing ~600-1100, stem/slider ~30-50, pins/contacts <=6. The stem colour is re-tinted per instance in ModelExperience to suggest different switch types.
